title: Joint power in unilateral skipping at emulated Moon gravity
author: Francesco Luciano, Bjoern Braunstein, James Cowburn, Valentina Natalucci, Dario Cazzola, Steffi Colyer, Kirsten Albracht, Verena Schuengel, Jörn Rittweger, Nolan Herssens, Tobias Weber, Dave Green, Dominic Farris, Alberto E. Minetti, Gaspare Pavei
editor: Neil Cronin, Taija Juutinen, Jonas Rubenson, Taylor Dick, Huub Maas
award: Early Career Award by Journal of Experimental Biology
